title: Olivia Rodrigo - Live from the Ace Theatre
original_title: Olivia Rodrigo – Live from the Ace Theatre
overview: Olivia Rodrigo performed at a surprise show at the Ace Theatre in Downtown Los Angeles on October 9th, 2023. For this intimate, stripped down performance, she played most of the songs from her about to be released album, "GUTS".

trailers.title: Olivia Rodrigo - get him back! (Live From The Ace Theatre - Amex Member Week Performance)
